strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and databases (MongoDB, MySQL)
Deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in scalable systems, performance optimization, and user-centric solutions
concerns: Limited recent work with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
Primary resume lists languages like D, Java, C# but not Kotlin (secondary stack requirement)
Less emphasis on security best practices or authentication/authorization in current roles
response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with a focus on scalability and AI-agent infrastructure, aligning well with the core stack. However, her recent work lacks explicit Nest.js experience (primary stack) and Kotlin (secondary stack), and security best-practice focus is not evident in her roles. Her diverse language expertise and leadership in open-source projects compensate partially but introduce concerns about depth in required technologies.
